data.小白模式提供简化的系统重装界面，自动应用推荐设置，: Easy Mode provides a simplified reinstall interface and applies recommended settings automatically,
data.适合不熟悉系统重装操作的用户。: ideal for users unfamiliar with system reinstallation.
data.反馈软件问题时，请将日志（log）等必要信息一并提供给开发者，: When reporting issues, please provide the logs and other necessary information to the developers,
data.以便更快定位与解决问题。开关在下次启动时生效。: so the problem can be located and resolved faster. This setting takes effect on the next launch.
data.镜像释放/备份使用的底层引擎。libwim 为内置默认；wimgapi 为 Wi: The underlying engine used for image deployment/backup. libwim is the built-in default; wimgapi is the native Windows API.
data.切换后正常系统端与 PE 端均使用该引擎；若 wimgapi 不可用会自动回退到: Once switched, both the system side and the PE side use this engine; if wimgapi is unavailable it automatically falls back to libwim.
data.⚠ 面向高级用户，小白请勿开启，设置不当可能导致无法开机。: ⚠ For advanced users only. Do not enable if you are inexperienced; incorrect settings may prevent the system from booting.
data.开启后解锁：安装 XP 时可选 UEFI 引导（供 UEFI 化魔改镜像）、: Once enabled, unlocks: optional UEFI boot when installing XP (for UEFI-modified images),
data.系统安装页「运行 Diskpart 脚本」、自定义修复引导脚本 bin\\rep: the "Run Diskpart Script" option on the install page, and the custom boot-repair script bin\repair_boot.txt.
data.部分系统镜像及 PE 下载服务由 Cloud-PE 云盘提供: Some system images and PE download services are provided by Cloud-PE Cloud Drive
data.感谢 电脑病毒爱好者 提供 WinPE: Thanks to 电脑病毒爱好者 for providing WinPE
data.感谢 Tik 参与测试与反馈: Thanks to Tik for testing and feedback
data.LetRecovery 是一款免费开源的 Windows 系统重装工具，: LetRecovery is a free and open-source Windows system reinstallation tool,
data.支持本地镜像安装、在线下载安装、系统备份等功能。: supporting local image installation, online download installation, system backup, and more.
